// SOURCE:      let a = 0;
// SOURCE-NEXT: {
// SOURCE-NEXT:   let b = 1;
// SOURCE-NEXT: }
// SOURCE-NEXT: {
// SOURCE-NEXT:   {
// SOURCE-NEXT:     let c = 2;
// SOURCE-NEXT:   }
// SOURCE-NEXT:   let d = 3;
// SOURCE-NEXT: }
// SOURCE-NEXT: {
// SOURCE-NEXT:   let e = 4;
// SOURCE-NEXT: }
// SOURCE-NEXT: let f = 5;
// SOURCE-NEXT: f = 6;
// SOURCE-NEXT: f = 7;
// SOURCE-NEXT: {
// SOURCE-NEXT:   let g = 6;
// SOURCE-NEXT: }
// SOURCE-NEXT: var h = 7;
// SOURCE-NEXT: var i = 8;
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: Prelude:
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-EMPTY:
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: Dataflow:
// SOURCE-NEXT: ================================================================
// SOURCE-NEXT: jsir.file ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:   ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:       // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:       // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:     jsir.program {"script"} ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:       ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         jsir.variable_declaration {"let"} ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:           ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             %9 = jsir.identifier_ref {"a"}
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // %9 = <unknown>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             %10 = jsir.numeric_literal {#jsir<numeric_literal_extra "0", 0.000000e+00 : f64>, 0.000000e+00 : f64}
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // %10 = 0.000000e+00 : f64
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             %11 = jsir.variable_declarator (%9, %10)
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // %11 = <uninitialized>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { <a#0 : 0.000000e+00 : f64> }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             jsir.exprs_region_end (%11)
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { <a#0 : 0.000000e+00 : f64> }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         })
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <unknown>] { <a#0 : 0.000000e+00 : f64> }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         %0 = jsir.boolean_literal {true}
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // %0 = true
// SOURCE-NEXT:           // State [default = <unknown>] { <a#0 : 0.000000e+00 : f64> }
// SOURCE-NEXT:         jshir.if_statement (%0) ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:           ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:               // State [default = <unknown>] { <a#0 : 0.000000e+00 : f64> }
// SOURCE-NEXT:             jshir.block_statement ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:               ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // <executable>
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // State [default = <unknown>] { <a#0 : 0.000000e+00 : f64> }
// SOURCE-NEXT:                 jsir.variable_declaration {"let"} ({
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                       // <executable>

// SOURCE-NEXT:               ^bb0:
// SOURCE-NEXT:                   // <executable>
